name: MapleJuice
description: Simplified Go version of Hadoop MapReduce with an underlying distributed file system built from scratch.

Uses a gossip-based protocol for failure detection and membership management. Tolerates up to three consecutive node failures via file replication, and includes a distributed log querier serving 60MB+ files per node.
Benchmarked against Hadoop on join and filter workloads using clusters of up to 10 VMs.

name: LeNet-5 Conv Layer Optimization
description: Optimized the forward pass of convolutional layers in a modified LeNet-5 CNN using CUDA with various parallelization techniques.
Profiled on the Fashion MNIST dataset using Nsight Compute to identify and validate optimization gains against the CPU baseline implementation.

name: OpenAlex Explorer
description: Stored the OpenAlex dataset in PostgreSQL with optimized queries for fast retrieval.
Built an interactive React web application supporting dynamic search, faceted filtering, and responsive visualizations.
